zh.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohra是Otto von Lohra和Berta的女兒，於大約1200年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格洛拉。她於1236年之前與Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein在德國薩辛哈爾波斯塔特雷根斯坦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1281年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohra是Otto von Lohra和Berta的女儿，于大约1200年出生在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格洛拉。她于1236年之前与Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein在德国薩辛哈爾波斯塔特雷根斯坦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1281年之前。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Lohra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ajay, Meena, Archana, Ashok, Bharat, Deepak, Pankaj, Pran, Rakesh, Saroj, Subhash, Sunil.  Arabic/Muslim Iqbal, Ismail, Sham, Yusuf, Abdul, Ahmed, Aref, Arif, Asif, Beshir, Kausar, Mohammad.
Indian (Punjab): Khatri and Sikh name, of uncertain origin. It is popularly thought to derive from Sanskrit vyūha ‘battle array’.
Muslim (Pakistan and India): apparently an occupational name from Urdu bohora ‘merchant’. In India it is found in Gujarat, where it is a cognate of Vahora . Compare Borah 4.

variants.name: Vora
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashok, Rajesh, Sanjay, Varsha, Ajay, Amit, Bharat, Jayesh, Mahendra, Manish, Navin, Ramesh.

variants.name: Vahora
meanings: Indian (Gujarat): from the name of a Muslim community, apparently a derivative of Sanskrit vyavahāra ‘trade’; however, only one subgroup of this community today is engaged in trade. Compare Vohra .

nameMeanings.name: Lukard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Lugger with excrescent -d.

variants.name: Lugger
meanings: form of Luitger . St Ludger ( c.744–809 ) was a Frisian who became a missionary in Westphalia and later first bishop of Münster, where he founded a monastery that gave the place its name.

en.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohra was born about 1200, in Lohra, Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany as the daughter of Otto von Lohra and Berta. She married Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein before 1236, in Regenstein, Halberstadt, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1281.

Elle a épousé Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein avant 1236, à Regenstein, Halberstadt, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1281.

de.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohra wurde um 1200 in Lohra, Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland, als Tochter von Otto von Lohra und Berta geboren. Sie hat vor 1236 in Regenstein, Halberstadt, Sachsen, Deutschland Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1281.

Lei sposato Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein prima del 1236, nel Regenstein, Halberstadt, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1281.

ja.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohraは約1200年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグロhラでOtto von LohraとBertaの娘として生まれた。1236年以前にドイツサチセンハルバースタトレジェンステインでGraf Ulirch I von Regensteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1281年以前に死去した。

ko.Lohra, Marburg, Hesse, Holy Roman Empire: 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그 로h라
ko.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohra(은)는 대략 1200년 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그 로h라에서 Otto von Lohra(와)과 Berta의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1236년 이전 독일 작센 할버스타드트 레겐스타인에서 Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 이전 사망했다.

ru.Lohra, Marburg, Hesse, Holy Roman Empire: лохра, крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Lukard von Lohra родилась около 1200 г. в местности лохра, крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. Её родителей звали Otto von Lohra и Berta. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein перед 1236 г. в местности редженстин, хэлбирстадт, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1281 г.
